untranslatable_reason: Calendar-based entry condition (Month = January) cannot be expressed using allowed indicators. The 'close' indicator represents price data, not calendar month. Allowed indicators are technical/price-based only and do not include date/month functions. A backtest engine would need explicit date filtering logic outside the indicator framework.
translation_notes: Signal is a calendar anomaly pattern (January Effect) on S&P CNX Nifty index. Entry: first trading day of January. Exit: end of January (31-day holding period). The observed_return_pct of 10.0% is historical context, not a condition. This signal requires calendar date comparison which is not available in the allowed indicator set.
